svg.title: WhalePasta future-vision public mockup
svg.desc: A public-safe animated future-vision mockup. Private data, credentials, addresses, customer details, and live operating strategy are omitted.

g.text: PUBLIC FUTURE MOCK / PRIVATE DETAILS OMITTED
Future screens separate candidate signal, market context, and canary behavior.
Research, paper, canary, and live lanes stay visually distinct.
The vision is less auto-pilot, more instrumented lab with clear brakes.
Caps, reconciliation, redemption, and rollback are part of the product surface.
Every automated action needs a reason trail.
The future view makes attribution, confidence, and operator override legible.
No identifiers, balances, live strategy, or wallet details belong in the public mock.
